groups.name: okapi.liquibase
groups.description: Liquibase auto-configuration settings for okapi's bundled migrations.

properties.name: okapi.purger.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox purger is enabled.

properties.name: okapi.purger.retention
properties.description: How long to keep delivered entries before purging.

properties.name: okapi.purger.batch-size
properties.description: Number of entries deleted per batch. Each purge cycle may execute multiple batches.

properties.name: okapi.processor.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox processor is enabled.

properties.name: okapi.processor.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of pending entries to process per tick.

properties.name: okapi.processor.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of delivery retries before marking an entry as failed.

properties.name: okapi.datasource-qualifier
properties.description: Name of the DataSource bean to use for the outbox. When set, okapi uses this specific DataSource instead of the primary one. Required in multi-datasource setups where the outbox table is not in the primary database.

properties.name: okapi.transaction-manager-qualifier
properties.description: Name of the PlatformTransactionManager bean that brackets the outbox DataSource. When not set, the unique (or @Primary) PTM is used. In multi-PTM setups always set this explicitly so okapi resolves the PTM bound to the outbox DataSource instead of the application's primary; silent PTM↔DataSource mismatch otherwise reduces FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED to JDBC auto-commit and permits duplicate delivery across processor instances.

properties.name: okapi.metrics.refresh-interval
properties.description: How often gauge metrics (okapi.entries.count, okapi.entries.lag.seconds) are refreshed from the outbox store. Each refresh runs one transaction with two queries. Requires okapi-micrometer on the classpath.

properties.name: okapi.liquibase.enabled
properties.description: Whether okapi's bundled Liquibase migration runs on startup. Set to false when the host application includes okapi's changelog from its own master changelog (in which case the application is responsible for applying classpath:com/softwaremill/okapi/db/postgres/changelog.xml or the MySQL equivalent).

properties.name: okapi.liquibase.changelog-table
properties.description: Liquibase tracking-table name for okapi's bundled migrations. Defaults to a dedicated table to keep okapi's migration history isolated from the host application's. Override to point at an existing shared table (e.g. databasechangelog).

properties.name: okapi.liquibase.changelog-lock-table
properties.description: Liquibase tracking lock-table name for okapi's bundled migrations. Override only when migrating from a setup that shared databasechangeloglock.
